strengths: Full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, and React demonstrated in multiple senior production roles managing high-scale systems
Active AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development at re:cinq directly matches rare required skill
Multiple staff-level roles and GISCollective founder experience showcase architecture, systems design, and enterprise infrastructure capability
concerns: Recent tenure of 6 months at re:cinq and 9-month career gap starting October 2025 raise continuity and commitment questions
Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned despite being in primary stack; strong Node.js and testing background mitigates but limits immediate hands-on evidence
PostgreSQL and GCP/Azure not explicitly mentioned; AWS CDK confirmed but overall cloud and database platform breadth unclear
response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of full-stack experience with demonstrated TypeScript, Node.js, and React proficiency across multiple senior production roles. Most valuably, he actively builds AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly matching a hard-to-find required skill. His multiple staff-level roles and GISCollective founder experience with microservices, Kubernetes, and enterprise infrastructure demonstrate readiness for mid-senior IC responsibilities. While recent tenure brevity and career gap warrant clarification, his 3+ years at Optilyz, strong commitment to testing and code quality, and open-source contributions indicate stability and craftsmanship. Framework-specific gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) are readily addressable given his deep Node.js ecosystem knowledge.
